overall.description: Static nighttime view of a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline across a dark body of water, featuring illuminated high-rise buildings shrouded in atmospheric fog with shimmering light reflections on the water surface. The scene appears to be from a video game with a distinct teal-green color grading.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront viewing area facing cyberpunk city skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cityscape across the water, with subtle camera breathing or slight movement

entered.detail: large corporate building with illuminated 'softsys' signage on the facade
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with various colored lights and windows glowing in the distance
dark water with horizontal light reflections and ripples creating white streaks across the foreground
thick haze and fog shrouding the base of buildings and creating depth layers in the cityscape

segments.scene_description: A static, atmospheric view of a cyberpunk city at night, viewed from across a body of water. The 'softsys' corporate building stands prominently on the right while illuminated skyscrapers rise in the center background, all partially obscured by dense fog. The water in the foreground reflects the city lights as shimmering horizontal streaks, and the overall color palette is dominated by deep teals and greens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric gaze across a dark body of water toward a futuristic cyberpunk skyline shrouded in dense fog. It begins with a wide view of the cityscape, where the softsys corporate building stands prominently on the right against a backdrop of illuminated skyscrapers. As the camera lingers, the deep teal and green color palette emphasizes the moody, neon-lit environment. The scene remains focused on the interplay between the hazy architecture and the water in the foreground, which captures the city lights as shimmering horizontal streaks.
